meta.title: Midan Alemar Contracting Co. | Saudi Arabia's Premier Construction Partner
meta.description: Leading construction and contracting company in Saudi Arabia since 2013 — civil works, infrastructure, steel erection, roads, landscape, and more.

hero.title: Building Saudi Arabia's
hero.subtitle: Your strategic construction partner since 2013. Delivering complex civil, infrastructure, steel, and landscape projects for Saudi Arabia's leading organizations.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Your Strategic Partner in Construction & Development
about.body1: Founded in 2013 with a clear vision: to be the ideal partner for every ambitious construction project in Saudi Arabia. Over more than a decade, we have established our presence through major projects ranging from NEOM to the Jubail Industrial City.
about.body2: We believe every project is a true contribution to the nation. That's why we deploy the best engineering talent and the most advanced equipment to deliver results that exceed expectations in quality, timing, and value.
highlights: Over 80 successfully completed projects across multiple sectors
Certified to ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 standards
A workforce of 338 engineers, technicians, and specialists
Modern heavy equipment fleet ensuring efficiency and speed
Established partnerships with Saudi Arabia's top companies
D-U-N-S registered with a verified credit rating (#67-269-8009)

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Comprehensive Construction Solutions
services.body: Seven specialized disciplines under one roof — engineered to the highest international standards from foundation to final handover.

civil.title: Civil Works
civil.desc: Full-scope reinforced concrete and structural works — from deep foundations and pile systems to superstructures and architectural finishes for industrial, commercial, and institutional clients.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Works
infrastructure.desc: End-to-end infrastructure development including internal road networks, utility corridors, drainage systems, potable water networks, and electrical distribution for large-scale industrial and residential projects.

finishing.title: Finishing Works
finishing.desc: Premium interior and exterior finishing services to the highest specification — flooring systems, wall cladding, ceiling systems, joinery, MEP finishing, and handover-ready fit-out for world-class developments.

steel.title: Steel Erection Works
steel.desc: Fabrication and erection of heavy structural steel systems for industrial facilities, warehouses, petrochemical plants, and special structures — executed with precision lifting equipment and certified welding teams.

roads.title: Roads & Asphalt Works
roads.desc: Full-cycle road construction and asphalt paving — from sub-base preparation and kerbing to multilayer asphalt laying, line marking, and road furniture installation for industrial zones and urban networks.

mosque.title: Mosque & Kitchen Works
mosque.desc: Specialized construction and fit-out of mosques and institutional kitchen facilities — from structural shell to full MEP, acoustic treatment, decorative Islamic finishes, and commercial kitchen equipment installation.

landscape.title: Landscape Works
landscape.desc: Creation of premium outdoor environments — soft landscaping with native and ornamental planting, hardscape elements, water features, decorative paving, pergolas, and automated irrigation for residential compounds, hotels, and public realm.

services.gridBody: From structural civil works to premium landscape design — a complete construction capability under a single roof.
services.ctaBody: Our engineering team is available to discuss your requirements and provide a detailed proposal.

neom-nrc26.title: NEOM Residence Community – NRC26
neom-nrc26.roleDesc: Engaged as Main Contractor for full civil and infrastructure works at NEOM's NRC26 residential community — delivering both the civil & finishing package (SAR 41M) and the infrastructure package (SAR 7M).
neom-nrc26.desc: Comprehensive civil, finishing, and infrastructure works for NEOM's NRC26 residential community in Sharma. A landmark project combining high-spec civil structures with complete infrastructure networks across the development.
scope: Interior and exterior finishing to NEOM specifications
Infrastructure networks including roads, utilities, and drainage
Quality assurance to NEOM's exacting international standards

neom-nrc17-civil.title: NEOM Residence Community – NRC17
neom-nrc17-civil.roleDesc: Engaged as Main Contractor for civil and finishing works at NEOM's NRC17 residential community.
neom-nrc17-civil.desc: Civil and finishing works for NEOM's NRC17 residential community in Shegree. Delivered to world-class NEOM specifications covering structural works and complete finishing.

mithaq.title: MITHAQ – Commercial Offices (6 Floors) – King Abdullah Road
mithaq.roleDesc: Engaged as Main Contractor for full civil works on a 6-floor commercial office building on King Abdullah Road.
mithaq.desc: Full civil works for a 6-floor commercial office building on King Abdullah Road, Riyadh. Delivered on a fast-track schedule for Al-Rujeib Holding Company.

zawiat-almezar.title: Zawiat Almezar – Huttin District (Offices & Restaurants)
zawiat-almezar.roleDesc: Engaged as Main Contractor for a full-scope development of offices and restaurants in Huttin District.
zawiat-almezar.desc: Full-scope construction of a mixed-use commercial development featuring offices and restaurants in the prestigious Huttin District. Delivered as a complete turnkey package for King Saud University.

sipchem.title: SIPCHEM – Civil, Finishing & Steel Works
sipchem.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for civil, finishing, and steel works across two SIPCHEM industrial facilities — the TMF factory in Riyadh's 2nd Industrial Area (SAR 22M) and the EVA film factory in Hail (SAR 34M).
sipchem.desc: Multi-site works for Saudi International Petrochemical Company encompassing civil concrete works, steel fabrication, and finishing across two major industrial facilities: the Tools Manufacturing Facility in Riyadh and the Ethanol Vinyl Acetate film factory in Hail.
scope: Quality compliance to petrochemical industry standards

ksu-ltc.title: KSU – Long Term Care Center (LTC)
ksu-ltc.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for civil works and CFRP structural reinforcement systems at the KSU Long Term Care Center.
ksu-ltc.desc: Civil works and advanced CFRP (Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymer) structural reinforcement for King Saud University's Long Term Care Center. A technically demanding project requiring precision execution and strict compliance with university facility standards.
scope: Quality compliance to KSU facility standards

saout1.title: Al-Nahda Philanthropic Society – SAOUT 1 Tower
saout1.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor delivering a full turnkey civil package for SAOUT 1 Tower.
saout1.desc: Turnkey civil works for the SAOUT 1 Tower on Salahuddin Road in Riyadh, delivered for Al-Nahda Philanthropic Society for Women. A complete structural project executed to the highest standards.

kinan-strip-mall.title: KINAN Strip Mall – PANDA Supermarket
kinan-strip-mall.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for full works on the KINAN Strip Mall and PANDA Supermarket development.
kinan-strip-mall.desc: Full civil and finishing works for the KINAN Strip Mall development featuring a PANDA Supermarket anchor tenant on King Salman Road, Riyadh. Delivered on a fast-track schedule.

khamis-substation.title: KHAMIS South Substation – Khamis Mushait
khamis-substation.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for civil works at the Khamis South electrical substation.
khamis-substation.desc: Civil works for the Khamis South electrical substation in Khamis Mushait, serving the Saudi Electrical Company network. Executed to strict SEC engineering and safety standards.

jmc-substation.title: JMC Substation – Jizan Medical City
jmc-substation.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for civil works at the Jizan Medical City electrical substation.
jmc-substation.desc: Civil works for the Jizan Medical City electrical substation, delivered for Saudi Electrical Company. Works executed to strict SEC engineering and safety standards.

yoowalk-mall.title: YooWalk Mall – Al Madinah (Arabian Centers)
yoowalk-mall.roleDesc: Engaged as Main Contractor for site backfilling and all necessary infrastructure works at YooWalk Mall in Al Madinah.
yoowalk-mall.desc: Site backfilling and comprehensive infrastructure works for the YooWalk Mall project in Al Madinah, commissioned by Arabian Centers — one of Saudi Arabia's leading retail operators.

riyadh-stormwater-37.title: Riyadh East Stormwater Pipeline – Contract #37
riyadh-stormwater-37.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for the eastern Riyadh stormwater pipeline, Contract #37.
riyadh-stormwater-37.desc: Major stormwater drainage pipeline for eastern Riyadh covering water pipelines, reinforced concrete basins, and all associated civil works for the National Water Company.

sweet-water-16.title: Sweet Water Pipeline – Contract #16 (Stage 1)
sweet-water-16.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for Stage 1 of the sweet water pipeline, Contract #16.
sweet-water-16.desc: Stage 1 potable water pipeline works including full pipeline installation and all necessary associated works for the National Water Company's Riyadh water network expansion.

sweet-water-15.title: Sweet Water Pipeline – Contract #15 (Stage 1)
sweet-water-15.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for Stage 1 of the sweet water pipeline, Contract #15, including site backfilling.
sweet-water-15.desc: Stage 1 potable water pipeline with site backfilling and all necessary works for the National Water Company's Riyadh network. A 24-month pipeline infrastructure project.

water-pipeline-2.title: Water Pipeline – Contract #2
water-pipeline-2.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for water pipeline and concrete basin works, Contract #2.
water-pipeline-2.desc: Water pipeline installation including concrete basins and all necessary civil works for the National Water Company's infrastructure network in Riyadh.

neom-nrc19-finishing.title: NEOM Residence Community – NRC19 (Finishing)
neom-nrc19-finishing.roleDesc: Engaged as Main Contractor for all finishing works at NEOM's NRC19 residential community.
neom-nrc19-finishing.desc: Premium finishing works for NEOM's NRC19 residential community in Shegree, delivering world-class interior and exterior finishes to NEOM's exacting international specifications.
scope: Premium flooring and wall cladding systems

aramco-ajyad.title: ARAMCO Ajyad – Dhahran
aramco-ajyad.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for comprehensive finishing works at the ARAMCO Ajyad development in Dhahran.
aramco-ajyad.desc: High-specification finishing works for ARAMCO's prestigious Ajyad development in Dhahran — one of the most demanding finishing projects in the Eastern Province, executed to Saudi Aramco's world-class quality standards.

amwaj.title: AMWAJ – Half Moon, Khobar
amwaj.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for finishing and MEP works at the prestigious AMWAJ Half Moon development.
amwaj.desc: Finishing and MEP works for the AMWAJ luxury residential development at Half Moon Bay, Khobar. A premium project combining sophisticated interior finishing with complete MEP system integration.

etre-store.title: ETRE Store – Panorama Mall (Luxury Market)
etre-store.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for luxury fit-out of the ETRE Store at Panorama Mall.
etre-store.desc: Luxury retail fit-out for the ETRE Store at Panorama Mall, featuring award-winning Italian design by Joseph Zirono and furniture from GBAM Italy. A prestige retail interior project for Bin Dawood Company.

neom-nc1.title: NEOM High Density – NC1 (PEB Buildings)
neom-nc1.roleDesc: Engaged as Main Contractor for supply and erection of Pre-Engineered Buildings (PEB) at NEOM's NC1 high-density development.
neom-nc1.desc: Supply and erection of Pre-Engineered Metal Buildings (PEB) for NEOM's NC1 high-density development in Sharma. Works executed to NEOM's stringent engineering and quality standards.

riyadh-cables.title: New Expansion – Riyadh Cables Factory
riyadh-cables.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for steel structure erection works in the new factory expansion.
riyadh-cables.desc: Steel erection works for the new expansion of Riyadh Cables Factory in the 2nd Industrial Area, Riyadh. Industrial steel fabrication and erection for one of Saudi Arabia's leading cable manufacturers.

arasco-silos.title: ARASCO Silos & Millers – Al Kharj
arasco-silos.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for construction of grain silos and milling facilities.
arasco-silos.desc: Construction of grain storage silos and milling facilities for ARASCO's agricultural operations in Al Kharj. Specialized steel and civil works for large-capacity poultry feed production infrastructure.

arar-airport.title: ARAR Airport – Roads & Asphalt
arar-airport.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for asphalt paving and road marking works at Arar Airport.
arar-airport.desc: Asphalt paving and road marking works at Arar Airport, including apron and taxiway surfaces with precision marking to aviation standards.

roads-shamasia.title: Roads in Shamasia
roads-shamasia.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for asphalt paving and road marking in the Shamasia area.
roads-shamasia.desc: Asphalt paving and road marking works in the Shamasia area, Riyadh. Fast-track road works covering full surface paving and precision line marking.

road-khalidiyah.title: Road Project – Al Khalidiyah Farm
road-khalidiyah.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for asphalt road works at Al Khalidiyah Farm.
road-khalidiyah.desc: Asphalt road construction at Al Khalidiyah Farm in Al Muzahmiyah. Agricultural estate road works covering base preparation and full asphalt surfacing.

neom-nrc17-kitchen.title: NEOM Residence Community – NRC17 (Kitchen)
neom-nrc17-kitchen.roleDesc: Engaged as Main Contractor for kitchen facility works at two NEOM NRC17 sites.
neom-nrc17-kitchen.desc: Design, supply, and installation of commercial kitchen facilities at NEOM's NRC17 residential communities across two sites — Sharma and Shegree. Executed to NEOM's world-class specifications.

neom-nrc19-mosque.title: NEOM Residence Community – NRC19 (Mosque)
neom-nrc19-mosque.roleDesc: Engaged as Main Contractor for supply and complete installation of mosque works at NEOM's NRC19 community.
neom-nrc19-mosque.desc: Supply and complete installation of mosque facilities at NEOM's NRC19 residential community. Full mosque works executed to the highest standards of craftsmanship and NEOM specification compliance.
scope: Prayer hall flooring and wall finishes

intercontinental-pool.title: Endless Pool – InterContinental Hotel
intercontinental-pool.roleDesc: Engaged as Main Contractor for the supply and installation of a full-option Endless Pool system at the InterContinental Hotel.
intercontinental-pool.desc: Luxury Endless Pool installation at the InterContinental Hotel Riyadh. A specialized aquatic feature project using Endless Pool technology, providing the hotel's guests with a premium swimming experience.
scope: Endless Pool system supply and installation

alwadi-park.title: Al Wadi Park – Jeddah
alwadi-park.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for landscape, hardscape, and water features at Al Wadi Park.
alwadi-park.desc: Comprehensive landscape, hardscape, and water feature works at Al Wadi Park in Jeddah for Saudi Aramco. A landmark park project combining natural planting, structured hardscape, and signature water features.

alnakhil-village.title: Al Nakhil Village – Jubail
alnakhil-village.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for landscape, hardscape, and water features at Al Nakhil Village.
alnakhil-village.desc: Landscape, hardscape, and water feature works at Al Nakhil Village in Jubail Industrial City, commissioned by the Royal Commission for Jubail and Yanbu.

hizam-park.title: Hizam Public Park – Special Fountains & Up Nozzles
hizam-park.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for the design and installation of special fountains and UP nozzle systems at Hizam Public Park.
hizam-park.desc: Specialized fountain and water feature systems at Hizam Public Park, Riyadh. Features custom-designed fountains with UP nozzle technology commissioned by the Riyadh Region Authority.
scope: Special fountain system design and installation

masharif-fountains.title: Masharif Hills – Special Pools & Fountains
masharif-fountains.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for special pool and fountain feature systems at the Masharif Hills residential district.
masharif-fountains.desc: Specialized pool and fountain systems for the Masharif Hills residential district in Riyadh, featuring water walls, decorative pool systems, and fountain elements commissioned by Kinan Company.

masharif-park.title: Masharif Hills Park – Al Narjis, Riyadh
masharif-park.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for landscape, hardscape, and water features at Masharif Hills Park.
masharif-park.desc: Landscape, hardscape, and water feature works for Masharif Hills Park in the Al Narjis District of Riyadh, commissioned by Kinan Company.

khuzama-park.title: Khuzama Public Park – Special Fountains & Up Nozzles
khuzama-park.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for the design and installation of special fountains using floating pump technology.
khuzama-park.desc: Specialized fountain system using floating pump technology at Khuzama Public Park, Riyadh. Custom water features designed and installed for the Riyadh Region Authority.

rawdah-park.title: Rawdah Park – Rawdah District, Riyadh
rawdah-park.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for landscape and hardscape works at Rawdah Park.
rawdah-park.desc: Landscape and hardscape feature works at Rawdah Park in the Rawdah District of Riyadh, commissioned by Riyadh Municipality.

dana-park.title: Dana Park – King Abdullah District, Riyadh
dana-park.roleDesc: Engaged as Subcontractor for landscape and hardscape works at Dana Park.
dana-park.desc: Landscape and hardscape feature works at Dana Park in the King Abdullah District, Riyadh. Delivered for Riyadh Municipality as part of the city's public parks development program.

stats.label: Our Achievements in Numbers
stats.title: Figures That Reflect Our Market Weight

why.label: Why Midan Alemar?
why.title: Six Reasons We Are the Right Choice
why.body: We are chosen over dozens of contracting companies in the Kingdom because what we offer goes beyond project execution — we deliver a strategic partnership built on trust, competence, and results.

items.title: Internationally Certified Quality
items.desc: We operate under the ISO 9001 quality management system, meaning every construction phase is subject to rigorous oversight and documented standards.

items.title: Strict On-Time Delivery
items.desc: Our track record speaks for itself: we have never been late on any of our major projects. Precise planning is our foremost pillar.

items.title: Elite Engineering Talent
items.desc: Our team comprises 338 specialists — engineers and technicians — with experience on Saudi Arabia's and the region's most prestigious projects.

items.title: Complete Equipment Fleet
items.desc: We own a fleet of more than 150 state-of-the-art heavy units, eliminating dependence on subcontractors and ensuring full schedule control.

items.title: Full Reporting Transparency
items.desc: We provide our clients with detailed, regularly updated progress reports so you remain fully informed at every stage of your project.

items.title: Real Value for Your Investment
items.desc: We study every project carefully and propose the most cost-efficient solutions without compromising material quality or execution precision.

clients.label: Our Clients
clients.title: Trusted by Saudi Arabia's Leading Organizations
clients.body: We are proud of strong strategic partnerships with some of the most prominent Saudi and international companies operating in the Kingdom.
clients.footnote: And many more major Saudi and regional companies — over 40 clients across 12 years

cta.label: Talk to Our Team
cta.photoTitle: Start Your Project With Us Today
cta.title: Let Us Turn Your Vision Into Built Reality
cta.body: Our engineering team is ready to study your project and present a comprehensive proposal including the timeline, budget estimate, and execution phases.

footer.tagline: A leading Saudi contracting company founded in 2013. We execute construction and infrastructure projects for top organizations to the highest international quality and safety standards.
footer.address: Eastern Ring Rd, Al Ezdihar Dist., Riyadh — KSA

header.title: Who We Are
header.subtitle: A leading Saudi contracting company in construction and infrastructure since 2013

about.intro: We believe great construction builds a better future. Every project we execute carries the hallmark of our quality and commitment.

values.title: Quality & Excellence
values.desc: We commit to the highest quality standards across all project execution phases in line with approved international benchmarks.

values.title: Professional Team
values.desc: We bring together highly experienced engineers and specialists across all areas of construction and development.

values.title: Environmental Sustainability
values.desc: We uphold environmental standards in all our projects, affirming our responsibility to the environment and community.

values.title: Partnership & Trust
values.desc: We build long-term client partnerships based on transparency, commitment, and measurable results.
